creator: ganbold-freebsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
(In reply to ganbold-freebsd from comment #3)

more /var/db/ports/databases_galera/options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for galera-25.3.15
_OPTIONS_READ=galera-25.3.15
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=BOOSTPOOL BPOSTATIC DEBUG DOCS TEST EPUB JSON LATEX PICKLE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=BOOSTPOOL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=BPOSTATIC
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=TEST
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=EPUB
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=JSON
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LATEX
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PICKLE
